items.name_en: 💕【New】Circular Interlocking G motif inspired by the brand's heritage, adding a touch of elegance to leather accessories. This 1970s style motif appears luxuriously on this Original GG canvas cardholder, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details for a refined taste. The interior features multiple compartments for various uses.
items.name_cn:
💕【New】Circular Interlocking G motif inspired by the brand's heritage, adding a touch of elegance to leather accessories. This 1970s style motif appears luxuriously on this Original GG canvas cardholder, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details for a refined taste. The interior features multiple compartments for various uses.
Black and black Original GG leather
Black leather trim with contrasting stitching
Taffeta lining
Circular interlocking G details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818811
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with grey-green leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
items.name_cn:
💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with grey-green leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
Grey-green and grey-green new GG monogram coated fabric
Grey-green leather trim
Webbing taffeta lining
Gucci embossed
Includes D-ring for hanging removable items
Contrasting stitching
Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm)
Snap closure
Color: 820688
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 323g
Color: Grey-green PVC/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. The brand's classic design details are reinterpreted every season, writing a new chapter for the brand's long design heritage. This card holder is crafted in black leather, featuring the classic double-G motif from the 1970s. Brown leather, gold-tone hardware, viscose lining, double-G logo, 6 card slots, 1 zip pocket.

items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. This GG Marmont card holder is crafted in classic, durable black leather, adding a classic piece to the 《Aria- 》 collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design in matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.
